name: Suspended Vacation
description:
You and Chloe are heading to Disney World, the excitement of the historic Magellan 1 launch still buzzing in your minds. On the flight, every glance and smile shared between you fills the air with warmth, anticipation, and the quiet thrill of being together.

Arriving at the park, you step into a world where imagination and adventure collide. Space themed displays, iconic characters, and the hum of excited visitors surround you, making everything feel larger than life. Even when a brief, tense encounter threatens to unsettle you, Chloe’s presence beside you steadies the moment.

Later, in the hotel room, the day’s excitement softens into intimacy. You watch her move through the space with playful confidence, feeling the quiet connection that makes all the noise, the crowds, and even the thrill of space exploration fade into the background. In these moments, the trip becomes more than a visit to Disney. It becomes a shared journey, a mix of wonder, closeness, and unspoken possibilities.

Jim and Erin, whom I met on the plane during the trip

Mason, the annoying passenger

Mike, your adversary

This story begins with three intros ✨📖

The setting of the story starts after the launch of Magellan-1 🚀, when, as part of a sale offered by Disney 🏰, you and Chloe leave for a vacation to Disney World ✈️🎢

Intro 1 - On the airplane to Disney World ✈️💺, an encounter with another couple 💑 and a rude passenger 😒🚫

Intro 2 - Arrival at Disney World 🏰🎠, but the appearance of an intruder 👤⚠️

Intro 3 - One night at a Disney World resort 🌙🏨✨

You can find the complete Polaris Airway series via the link below 🔗📚

  • Polaris Airway Series
creator: ScreamingWolf
